languages.text: "Наконец-то меровцы перейдут в контратаку на Зарков! Ваша Светлость, это первая битва в завоевании целого мира!"
"Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"
languages.original_text: "Наконец-то меровцы перейдут в контратаку на Зарков! Ваша Светлость, это первая битва в завоевании целого мира!"

traits.locale_text: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"
"Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"
"Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"

languages.text: 「ついに、メロヴィアンがザルコフに反撃を開始する！貴方様、これはこの惑星を征服する最初の戦いです！」
languages.original_text: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"

traits.locale_text: 「ついに、メロヴィアンがザルコフに反撃を開始する！貴方様、これはこの惑星を征服する最初の戦いです！」

languages.text: «¡Por fin, los merovianos pasan al contraataque en Zarkov! ¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, esta será la primera batalla por la conquista del planeta!».
languages.original_text: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Por fin, los merovianos pasan al contraataque en Zarkov! ¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, esta será la primera batalla por la conquista del planeta!».

languages.text: “终于，梅罗夫人要在扎尔科夫展开反攻了！大人，这是征服整个行星的开幕之战！”
languages.original_text: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"

traits.locale_text: “终于，梅罗夫人要在扎尔科夫展开反攻了！大人，这是征服整个行星的开幕之战！”

languages.text: "Endlich gehen die Merovianer auf Zarkov zum Gegenangriff über! Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, das ist die erste Schlacht im Kampf um den gesamten Planeten!"
languages.original_text: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"

traits.locale_text: "Endlich gehen die Merovianer auf Zarkov zum Gegenangriff über! Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, das ist die erste Schlacht im Kampf um den gesamten Planeten!"

languages.text: "Sonunda Merovlular, Zarkov'da karşı saldırıya geçiyor! {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bu tüm gezegenin fethindeki ilk muharebe!"
languages.original_text: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"

traits.locale_text: "Sonunda Merovlular, Zarkov'da karşı saldırıya geçiyor! {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bu tüm gezegenin fethindeki ilk muharebe!"

languages.text: « Les Meroviens vont enfin pouvoir lancer la contre-attaque visant à soumettre Zarkov ! C'est la première bataille de notre conquête de la planète tout entière, Votre Seigneurie ! »
languages.original_text: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"

traits.locale_text: « Les Meroviens vont enfin pouvoir lancer la contre-attaque visant à soumettre Zarkov ! C'est la première bataille de notre conquête de la planète tout entière, Votre Seigneurie ! »
